title: Production managers and directors in mining and energy
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the work activities and resources necessary for manufacturing products in accordance with cost, quality, and quantity specifications. Plan, direct, or coordinate quality assurance programs. Formulate quality control policies and control quality of laboratory and production efforts. Manage operations at geothermal power generation facilities. Maintain and monitor geothermal plant equipment for efficient and safe plant operations. (Based on 25 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Monitor and operate geothermal power generation facilities, including managing operations, maintenance, and repairs to ensure compliance with applicable standards or regulations. Supervise employees, oversee safety programs, and communicate plant conditions to ensure efficient and safe operations.

Prepare and manage budgets for geothermal operations and biomass plants, ensuring materials, labor, and equipment efficiency to meet production targets. Conduct cost, material, and efficiency studies for biofuels production plants.

Develop operating plans and schedules for geothermal operations, including planning activities related to production, shipping, maintenance, or quality assurance. Monitor meters, flow gauges, or other real-time data to ensure proper operation of biofuels production equipment.
Plan, direct, or coordinate quality assurance programs and control the quality of laboratory and production efforts in geothermal and biofuels operations.
Train crews and implement safety procedures to improve operational effectiveness and ensure compliance with safety standards in geothermal power plants and biomass facilities.
Inspect geothermal plant or injection well fields and biomass facilities for proper equipment operations, safety, and adherence to regulatory requirements.
Monitor transportation and storage of feedstocks or products to ensure adherence to safety guidelines in both geothermal and biofuels operations.
Conduct field inspections of biomass plants and review logs and reports to ensure safe operations and identify opportunities for improvement.
Remove core samples during drilling to determine the nature of the strata being drilled, and supervise drilling operations including selecting drill bits according to strata conditions.
Repair or replace defective parts of geothermal and biomass machinery or equipment, and perform routine maintenance to ensure proper performance.
Develop and manage policies to ensure adherence to environmental regulations and operational standards in the production of biofuels and geothermal energy.
Conduct regular safety inspections on equipment and tools used in geothermal operations and biomass processing.
Create reports on operational status and equipment conditions in geothermal and biomass facilities to aid in strategic decision-making and regulatory compliance.
Provide technical direction to teams regarding the installation or maintenance of geothermal and biomass power equipment.
Evaluate operational performance and identify trends to improve efficiency in power production from geothermal and biofuels plants.
Negotiate interconnection agreements with other utilities related to geothermal and biomass energy production. Prepare reports on agreements and operational contracts as necessary.
Document geological formations encountered during drilling operations and prepare environmental permit applications for geothermal facilities.
Unloader and assemble pipes and pumping equipment, using hand tools and conduct site audits to ensure adherence to safety and environmental regulations.
Develop or implement projects to improve efficiency, economy, or effectiveness of energy plant operations, including hydroelectric and geothermal.
Coordinate the disposal of hazardous waste and ensure compliance with environmental regulations.
Prepare, review, and submit documentation and reports for environmental, construction, or remediation projects; ensure compliance with applicable government or industrial codes and standards.
Manage operations and oversee maintenance of wind generation facilities, including supervising employees or subcontractors, tracking costs, and ensuring safety standards are met.
Develop and implement programs and strategies to monitor and enhance environmental compliance and sustainability efforts within operations.
Conduct investigations, audits, and assessments to ensure adherence to compliance standards and identify areas for improvement in operational practices.
Establish and maintain relationships with regulatory agencies, stakeholders, and the community to facilitate compliance and project success.
Provide training and support for employees on compliance, environmental policies, and operational procedures to ensure adherence and efficiency.
Supervise the work of subcontractors or consultants to ensure quality and conformance to specifications or budgets.
Review, negotiate, or approve wind farm contracts and monitor project milestones and deliverables.
Submit project deliverables to clients, ensuring adherence to quality standards, and report project status to managers, including budget, resources, technical issues, or customer satisfaction.
Plan, schedule, or coordinate project activities to meet deadlines, and prepare and submit budget estimates, progress reports, or cost tracking reports.
Negotiate with project stakeholders or suppliers to obtain resources or materials and identify project needs such as resources, staff, or finances by reviewing project objectives and schedules.
Confer with project personnel to identify and resolve problems and communicate with key stakeholders to determine project requirements and objectives.
Assign duties or responsibilities to project personnel and monitor the performance of project team members to provide performance feedback.
Identify, review, or select vendors or consultants to meet project needs, develop or update project plans including information such as objectives, technologies, schedules, funding, and staffing.
Create project status presentations for delivery to customers or project personnel.
